class.name: UtilityAIBTRepeater
class.brief_description: Ticks its child until [member max_repeat_times] is reached.
class.description: The [UtilityAIBTRepeater] node ticks its child until [member max_repeat_times] is reached. If [member max_repeat_times] is set to [code]-1[/code] the child will be ticked indefinitely.
